===Definitions===
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# to [[roll]]; to [[roll up]]; to [[curl]]
# [[roll]]; [[cylinder]]; [[tube]]; [[scroll]]
# [[rolled up]]; [[curly]]
# {{zh-classifier|[[rolled]] objects|t=[[roll]]s, [[reel]]s|cat=y}}
# to [[sweep]] up; to [[carry]] along; to [[sweep]] away
# to [[embroil]]; to [[involve]]
# {{lb|zh|neologism|slang}} {{zh-short|內捲|intense [[competition]] among [[peer]]s; to [[study]] harder or [[work]] longer as a result}}
